forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.key_change: ↓ ARC-AGI-3 benchmark (frontier models <1%) reveals larger remaining gap; April Fools' joke signals caution
forecasts.base_rate: Metaculus forecasters as of Feb 2026: 25% by 2029
factors_up: Expert consensus shift: Hassabis 50% by 2030, Altman targeting 2028-2029
Continued scaling: Anthropic 1M TPUs, OpenAI 30GW infrastructure
Historical AI underestimation: past predictions consistently conservative
factors_down: ARC-AGI-3: frontier models <1% on interactive reasoning: -6pp
April Fools' joke reveals reluctance to claim AGI: -3pp
key_uncertainties: Definition of AGI may shift interpretations
Speed of reasoning breakthroughs vs scaling alone
Whether labs will claim AGI even if thresholds met
update_triggers_down: Evidence scaling insufficient for AGI capabilities

forecasts.question: Will economic consultancy lose ≥33% value/jobs by end 2030 due to AI?
forecasts.key_change: → Stable; McKinsey 30% work-hour automation projection offset by industry growth and AI services pivot
forecasts.base_rate: Professional services disruption: ~8-15% historical precedent for 33%+ decline over 6 years
factors_down: AI consulting services market growing to $72.8B by 2030: -3pp
Industry adapting via AI services offsets decline: -3pp
key_uncertainties: Will 30% work-hour automation translate to 33%+ revenue decline?
Can firms transition to AI consulting services?
Attribution: will 2+ credible sources make explicit AI causal claims?
update_triggers_up: Major firm reports >20% YoY revenue decline attributed to AI
Industry employment falls >15% attributed to AI
update_triggers_down: Firms grow AI consulting revenue offsetting traditional decline

forecasts.question: Will Labour be largest party at next UK General Election?
forecasts.key_change: ↑ Restore Britain split fragments right-wing vote; betting markets briefly show Labour as favourite
forecasts.base_rate: Incumbent retention after 14-month approval collapse: <5% historical precedent
factors_up: Restore Britain split fragments Reform vote: +3-5pp
Tactical voting: 33% Labour voters willing to vote Con to block Reform: +2-3pp
Betting market shift: Labour briefly 13/8 favourite: +2pp
factors_down: Reform maintains 26% core support, 381 projected seats: -8pp
Labour at 19% vote share, projected 85 seats: -6pp
key_uncertainties: Will Restore Britain sustain support and field candidates?
Election timing: earlier vs 2029 changes dynamics
Tactical voting coordination effectiveness

forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2035?
forecasts.key_change: ↑ +3pp from reasoning model breakthroughs; ARC-AGI generalization gaps persist but longer horizon allows resolution
factors_up: o3 reasoning breakthrough with 20% error reduction: +5pp
key_uncertainties: Will inference-time scaling continue or plateau?
How will AGI be recognized if capabilities emerge gradually?
Geopolitical/safety delays on disclosure?
update_triggers_up: Major lab announces AGI or imminent AGI
update_triggers_down: Major safety incident causing regulatory slowdown

forecasts.question: Will China initiate a military blockade or invasion of Taiwan before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.key_change: → Stable; US intel downgrade to 2027 offset by PLA blockade rehearsals and rhetoric escalation
forecasts.base_rate: Taiwan Strait crisis ~1 per decade; <1% annual kinetic action rate; 83% experts reject 2027 invasion
factors_down: US intel March 2026: no 2027 invasion plan: -2pp
Intel consensus: 2030s as primary risk window: -2pp
key_uncertainties: Whether rehearsals transition to actual blockade
Trump admin actual Taiwan defense commitment
Miscalculation risk in crowded Taiwan Strait
update_triggers_up: Major US arms sale reduction to Taiwan

forecasts.question: Will UK annual CPI inflation fall below 2.0% for at least one month before 1 January 2027?
forecasts.key_change: ↓ BoE revisions show inflation stickier; Feb 2026 at 3.0%, Q3 expected 3.5%; consensus 2.1-2.2% at best
forecasts.base_rate: BoE forecast 2.1% Q2 2026; Treasury survey 2.2% Q4 2026; neither below 2.0%
factors_up: April energy cap reduction provides temporary relief: +0.5pp
Base effects from 2025 provide some downward pressure: +0.5pp
factors_down: Feb 2026 CPI at 3.0%, far above target: -2pp
BoE revised up to 3.5% for Q3 2026: -2pp
Consensus forecasts cluster at 2.1-2.2%, above threshold: -1pp
key_uncertainties: March data (releasing 22 April) could surprise
Geopolitical energy shocks could push inflation higher
Timing of July price cap increase
update_triggers_down: July price cap larger than expected

forecasts.question: Will Spider-Man: Brand New Day gross over $1.5B worldwide by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.key_change: ↑ Record 1B+ trailer views confirmed; conservative projections at $2.31B well above threshold
forecasts.base_rate: MCU $1.5B+ threshold met by 75% of major releases; No Way Home $1.9B
key_uncertainties: Opening weekend performance vs projections
Critical reception
Competitive releases July-Dec 2026

forecasts.question: Will OpenAI and Anthropic have a combined ARR exceeding $70B by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.key_change: → Slight decrease; growth moderation risk despite strong $44B combined current trajectory
forecasts.base_rate: Corporate software high-growth forecasting: 70-75% accuracy for 8-9 month projections
key_uncertainties: ARR definition (run-rate vs contracted)
Anthropic H2 growth trajectory
OpenAI enterprise scaling beyond 40% penetration
update_triggers_up: Either company >50% quarterly growth in Q2/Q3

forecasts.question: Will UK average annual real GDP growth exceed 1.5% across the 2030s (2030-2039)?
forecasts.key_change: → Minimal change; OBR medium-term potential at 1.5% but productivity revisions down offset by AI potential
forecasts.base_rate: OBR medium-term potential output growth: 1.5%; recent 2026-2030 forecasts averaging 1.5%
factors_up: Energy cost support and tax relief: +1pp
AI productivity potential if adoption gap closes: +3pp
key_uncertainties: Whether AI productivity gap closes in 2030s
Migration policy and net migration assumptions
Global economic shocks
